title: hemizonia parryi var. congdonii
intro: Hemizonia parryi var. congdonii, commonly known as Congdon's tarweed, is a plant species in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The therapeutic actions of Congdon's tarweed include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which may be attributed to its bioactive constituents, including sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential therapeutic applications and confirm its traditional uses.

side_effects: Hemizonia parryi var. congdonii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues in some individuals.
